title: Marketplace new feature: Save Apps for Later with “Favorites”

posts.author: galhe (Gal Even Hen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ever come across an app you found interesting but didn’t have time to further explore and evaluate? Now you can bookmark apps as favorites to explore when it’s convenient for you!

How it works:

  • Apps that you’ve marked as favorites will appear in a dedicated section sorted by the most recently added favorites.
  • Easily access and install them when you’re ready to dive deeper.
  • The Saved Apps feature is available directly from the app listing page.

This feature will be launched next week
